overview: A fully functional Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) Refiner app — create, analyze, and refine ICP definitions with a clean dashboard, completeness scoring, and persistent storage per authenticated user.
features: Internet Identity login with persistent sessions
Create, edit, and delete ICP profiles
ICP completeness scoring and refinement suggestions
Dashboard with hero section and quick actions
Profiles list with full CRUD management
ICP detail view with analysis panel
Export profile as JSON and copy to clipboard
Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
